FAILED tests/test_pricing.py::PricingTest::test_price_calculation

================================ FAILURES ===================================
___________ PricingTest::test_price_calculation ____________

tests/test_pricing.py:44: AssertionError
  assert result == expected
  where result   = calculate_total_price(items=[{'id': 'A1', 'qty': 3}])
  and expected   = 29.97
  but got        = 32.97

Note: This test passed consistently in all runs prior to commit d7e4a91 ('refactor: update VAT rounding logic').
The expected value 29.97 was verified correct against the pricing spec v2.1.
